economic_notes: Splatsin owns Quilakwa Investments Ltd. (retail gas station near Enderby BC), Yucwmenlucwu Caretakers of the Land 2007 LLP (logging and environmental services near Enderby BC), and Splatsin Development Corporation. Forest Consultation and Revenue Sharing Agreement generates significant revenue. Multi-Purpose Community Facility and gas bar/convenience store constructed on Enderby Indian Reserve #2 financed through FNFA totaling $18,259,622.
notes: Comparative 2021 figures restated to include equity earnings from government business enterprises in revenue (increase of $1,255,087). Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Quilakwa Investments Ltd., Splatsin Development Corporation, Yucwmenlucwu 2007 LLP. Four funds consolidated: Operating, Trust, Capital, Social Housing. Prior period restatement noted in auditor report. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $8,083,917 + FNHA $1,481,021 + CMHC $1,324,599 + Forest Consultation $2,715,982 = $13,605,519; however Forest Consultation and Revenue Sharing Agreement may be considered OSR — if excluded, government transfers = $10,889,537. OSR calculated excluding Forest Consultation as government transfer per statement presentation grouping all items shown; total_government_transfers set to ISC+FNHA+CMHC+Forest = 13605519 and osr = 7655341. Annual debt service reflects long-term debt reduction only ($556,212); demand loan and mortgage repayments also occurred. Annual debt servicing costs per Note A12 stated as $1,012,968.
